en.intro_1: I'm Bowei Xu, a full-stack software developer based in College Station, Texas, with 3+ years of experience independently designing and shipping enterprise-grade business systems. At Fuel Cell Store I'm the sole developer behind an end-to-end ERP/MES platform - a 50+ table database schema and 100,000+ line codebase - translating real manufacturing and operations requirements into production software.
en.intro_2: I work end to end: database design, backend APIs, responsive interfaces, and the operational dashboards that tie them together. I lean on modern AI-assisted development workflows to ship faster without giving up engineering judgment or code review.
en.looking_body: Open to full-stack and backend software engineering roles. I'm at my best owning systems end to end and turning messy operational problems into reliable software.
en.edu_1_detail: M.S. in Computer Science · Los Angeles, CA · 2020-2022
en.edu_2_detail: B.Eng. in Computer Science and Technology · Kaifeng, China · 2016-2020
en.beyond_body: Outside of work I'm a competitive Go player (AGA 6-dan) and two-time 1st-place winner of the Houston Go Tournament. The game keeps my pattern recognition and long-term planning sharp.

zh.intro_1: 我是徐博伟，一名常驻美国德州 College Station 的全栈软件开发工程师，拥有 3 年以上独立设计并交付企业级业务系统的经验。在 Fuel Cell Store，我作为唯一开发者从零搭建了端到端的 ERP/MES 平台——50+ 张表的数据库架构、10 万行以上代码——将真实的制造与运营需求转化为生产级软件。
zh.intro_2: 我能端到端地完成工作：数据库设计、后端 API、响应式界面，以及把它们串联起来的运营看板。我借助现代 AI 辅助开发流程更快交付，同时不放弃工程判断与代码审查。
zh.looking_body: 正在寻找全栈 / 后端软件工程师的机会。我最擅长端到端地负责整个系统，把繁杂的运营问题转化为可靠的软件。
zh.edu_1_detail: 计算机科学硕士 · 洛杉矶，加州 · 2020-2022
zh.edu_2_detail: 计算机科学与技术 工学学士 · 开封，中国 · 2016-2020
zh.beyond_body: 工作之外，我是一名竞技围棋手（AGA 6 段），两度夺得休斯顿围棋公开赛冠军。围棋让我的模式识别和长线规划能力保持敏锐。
